zh.Vianen, heerlijkheid, Noord-Brabant,: 荷蘭努-布拉班特可維安
zh.lifeSummary: 當Guillaume de Lalaing, Seigneur de Lalaing於從1395年到1404年出生在荷蘭-拉藍德維安時，他的父親Othon II de Lallaing, Seigneur de Lalaing66歲，母親Jolande de Barbençon, Dame de Hantes39歲。他於1415年之後與Jeanne de Créquy結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1475年8月27日在比利時奧斯吉福拉安德倫。

zh-hans.Vianen, heerlijkheid, Noord-Brabant,: 荷兰努-布拉班特可維安
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Guillaume de Lalaing, Seigneur de Lalaing于从1395年到1404年出生在荷兰-拉藍德維安时，他的父亲Othon II de Lallaing, Seigneur de Lalaing66岁，母亲Jolande de Barbençon, Dame de Hantes39岁。他于1415年之后与Jeanne de Créquy结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1475年8月27日在比利时奧斯吉福拉安德倫。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Guillaume
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: William
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.description: The courtyard Episcopal palace at Atrecht had witch burnings.

en.lifeSummary: When Guillaume de Lalaing, Seigneur de Lalaing was born from 1395 to 1404, in Vianen, South Holland, Netherlands, his father, Othon II de Lallaing, Seigneur de Lalaing, was 66 and his mother, Jolande de Barbençon, Dame de Hantes, was 39. He married Jeanne de Créquy after 1415. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 27 August 1475, in East Flanders, Belgium.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Guillaume de Lalaing, Seigneur de Lalaing est né du 1395 au 1404, à Vianen, Hollande-Méridionale, Pays-Bas, son père, Othon II de Lallaing, Seigneur de Lalaing, avait 66 ans et sa mère, Jolande de Barbençon, Dame de Hantes, avait 39 ans. Il a épousé Jeanne de Créquy après 1415. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 27 août 1475, à Flandre-Orientale, Belgique.

de.lifeSummary: Als Guillaume de Lalaing, Seigneur de Lalaing von 1395 bis 1404 in Vianen, Südholland, Niederlande geboren wurde, war sein Vater Othon II de Lallaing, Seigneur de Lalaing 66 und seine Mutter Jolande de Barbençon, Dame de Hantes 39. Er hat nach 1415 Jeanne de Créquy geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 27. August 1475 in Ostflandern, Belgien.

it.Vianen, heerlijkheid, Noord-Brabant,: Vianen, Cuijk, Brabante settentrionale, Paesi Bassi
it.lifeSummary: Quando Guillaume de Lalaing, Seigneur de Lalaing è nato il da 1395 a 1404 nel Vianen, Zuid-Holland, Paesi Bassi, il suo padre, Othon II de Lallaing, Seigneur de Lalaing, aveva 66 anni e il suo madre, Jolande de Barbençon, Dame de Hantes, aveva 39 anni. Lui sposato Jeanne de Créquy dopo il 1415. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 27 agosto 1475, nel Fiandra Orientale, Belgio.

ja.Vianen, South Holland, Netherlands: オランダズイド-hオランドヴィアンン
ja.Poeke, Oost-Vlaanderen, België: ベルギーオオスト-vラアンデレンポエク
ja.East Flanders, Belgium: ベルギーオオスト-vラアンデレン
ja.Vianen, heerlijkheid, Noord-Brabant,: オランダノオルド-ブラバントクウイジクヴィアンン
ja.lifeSummary: Guillaume de Lalaing, Seigneur de Lalaingがから1395年まで1404年にオランダズイド-hオランドヴィアンンで生まれた時，父Othon II de Lallaing, Seigneur de Lalaingは66歳，母Jolande de Barbençon, Dame de Hantesは39歳であった。1415年以後にJeanne de Créquyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1475年8月27日にベルギーオオスト-vラアンデレンで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Guillaume de Lalaing, Seigneur de Lalaing(이)가 1395년 부터 1404년 까지 네덜란드 주이드-홀랜드 비누넨에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Othon II de Lallaing, Seigneur de Lalaing(은)는 66세였고, 그의 어머니 Jolande de Barbençon, Dame de Hantes(은)는 39세였다. 그는 1415년 이후 Jeanne de Créquy(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1475년 8월 27일 벨기에 스트-블라아더에서 사망했다.

lv.from 1395 to 1404–27 August 1475: no 1395. gada līdz 1404. gadam–1475. gada 27. augusts

pt.Vianen, heerlijkheid, Noord-Brabant,: Vianen, Cuijk, Brabante do Norte, Países Baixos
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Guillaume de Lalaing, Seigneur de Lalaing nasceu de 1395 a 1404, em Vianen, Zuid-Holland, Países Baixos, seu pai, Othon II de Lallaing, Seigneur de Lalaing, tinha 66 anos e sua mãe, Jolande de Barbençon, Dame de Hantes, tinha 39 anos. Ele casou-se com Jeanne de Créquy após 1415. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 27 de agosto de 1475, em Flandres Oriental, Bélgica.

ro.Vianen, heerlijkheid, Noord-Brabant,: Vianen, Cuijk, Noord-Brabant, Ţările de Jos

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Guillaume de Lalaing, Seigneur de Lalaing родился с 1395 по 1404 в местности вянен, зуид-холланд, Нидерланды, его отцу по имени Othon II de Lallaing, Seigneur de Lalaing было 66 лет, а матери, которую звали Jolande de Barbençon, Dame de Hantes, 39. Он женился на женщине по имени Jeanne de Créquy после 1415 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 27 августа 1475 г. в местности уст-влаандирен, Бельгия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Guillaume de Lalaing, Seigneur de Lalaing nació desde 1395 hasta 1404, en Vianen, Zuid-Holland, Países Bajos, su papá, Othon II de Lallaing, Seigneur de Lalaing, tenía 66 años y su mamá, Jolande de Barbençon, Dame de Hantes, tenía 39 años. Se casó con Jeanne de Créquy después de 1415. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 27 de agosto de 1475, en Flandes Oriental, Bélgica.
